description: Composition Navy blue jacket made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs that has red and grey stripes, navy and white panel detailing around the armholes, hoodie with drawstring, zippered front placket, patch pockets on either sides of the zipper placket, appliqued helmet and embroidered lettering on the upper left chest, distressed look numbering on the back and ribbed hemline with red and grey stripes Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Hang dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print or embroidery The appliqued elements on the chest and printed numbering on the back in classic colours add rugged styling to this hooded jacket from basics, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans, tees and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'11' and shoulders 17.5"
